description: Qualtrics response identifier (e.g., R_2JR2Bi...)
name: response_id

description: Qualtrics survey identifier; one per timepoint (e.g., SV_5nV94...)
name: survey_id

description: Timepoint/wave identifier (e.g., '1, int64')
name: timepoint

description: CloudConnect participant identifier; join key to survey_0.prolific_pid
name: prolific_pid

description: Raw phone digits; secondary join key when prolific_pid is missing
name: phone_number

description: Instructed response attention check; correct answer is 'Once' (label)
name: attention_check

description: Number of meetings attended since timepoint stem (integer)
name: meetings_num

description: Time spent in meetings in minutes since timepoint stem (integer)
name: meetings_time

description: Turnover intention: how often thought about leaving employer (label)
name: turnover_intention

description: UTC timestamp when this row was inserted
name: _created_at

description: Whether downstream processing has completed
name: _processed
